author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Add a ToDeviceBackward grad_fn that copies the gradient back to the source device. When to() is called on a tensor that has requires_grad=true and grad is enabled, create the result via from_operation with ToDeviceBackward instead of from_storage. Leaf tensors that are moved should also get requires_grad on the new tensor. This matches PyTorch's behavior where to() is differentiable.
